mapper.sql: WK_USER_LRN_STS AS ( SELECT WS.SBJCT_ID , L.USER_ID , L.LCTR_WKNO AS WKNO , MAX(L.PRGRT) AS LRN_PRGRT , MAX(CASE WHEN L.PRGRT >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CMPTN_YN_NUM , MAX(CASE WHEN L.LRN_STSCD = 'ATND' THEN 3 WHEN L.LRN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN 2 WHEN L.LRN_STSCD = 'ABSNT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LRN_STS_ORD FROM TB_LMS_BYWK_USER_LRN_STS L JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WS ON WS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = L.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID WHERE WS.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} GROUP BY WS.SBJCT_ID, L.USER_ID, L.LCTR_WKNO )
PRGRT_TO_STS AS ( SELECT C.SBJCT_ID , C.LRN_PRD_IN_PRGRT AS ATND_MIN_PRGRT , C.LATE_RCG_PRD_IN_PRGRT AS LATE_MIN_PRGRT FROM TB_LMS_BYWKNO_ATTNDNC_CRTR C WHERE C.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} )

CASE WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 3 THEN 'ATND' WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 2 THEN 'LATE' WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 'ABSNT' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 'ATND' WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 'LATE' ELSE 'ABSNT' END

sql.if: AND ( LOWER(U.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{srchKeyword})) OR U.STDNT_NO LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(#{srchKeyword}) OR LOWER(D.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{srchKeyword})) )

mapper.sql: ASMT_TOT AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ASMT_ID) AS ASMT_TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN,'N') = 'N' ), ASMT_SUB AS ( SELECT S.USER_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT S.ASMT_ID) AS ASMT_SBMSN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN S JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT M ON M.ASMT_ID = S.ASMT_ID WHERE M.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(M.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND S.SBMSN_DTTM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY S.USER_ID ), QA_STATS AS ( SELECT A.USER_ID , COUNT(CASE WHEN A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' THEN 1 END) AS QA_REG_CNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NOT NULL AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N')='N' THEN 1 END) AS QA_ANS_CNT FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON B.BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' GROUP BY A.USER_ID ), TALK_STATS AS ( SELECT C.USER_ID , COUNT(*) AS TALK_REPLY_CNT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A ON A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = C.DSCS_ATCL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS D ON D.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(D.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(C.DELYN,'N') = 'N' GROUP BY C.USER_ID ), QUIZ_TOT AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT B.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS QUIZ_TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' ), QUIZ_SUB AS ( SELECT T.USER_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT B.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS QUIZ_SBMSN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM T JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ON D.EXAM_DTL_ID = T.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON B.EXAM_BSC_ID = D.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' AND T.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN = 'Y' GROUP BY T.USER_ID ), SRVY_TOT AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS SRVY_TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' ), SRVY_SUB AS ( SELECT P.USER_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT P.SRVY_ID) AS SRVY_SBMSN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP P JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY S ON S.SRVY_ID = P.SRVY_ID WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N') = 'N' GROUP BY P.USER_ID ), DSCC_TOT AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS DSCC_TOT_CNT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN,'N') = 'N' ), DSCC_SUB AS ( SELECT A.USER_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT A.DSCS_ID) AS DSCC_SBMSN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS D ON D.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(D.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND A.ATCL_LV = 1 GROUP BY A.USER_ID ), EXAM_SCR AS ( SELECT T.USER_ID -- 중간고사: 실시간(RLTM) / 대체 / 기타 , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'N' AND B.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD = 'RLTM' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS MID_LIVE_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'Y' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS MID_ALT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD,'X') != 'RLTM' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS MID_ETC_SCORE -- 기말고사: 실시간(RLTM) / 대체 / 기타 , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_LST','EXAM_LST_TEAM') AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'N' AND B.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD = 'RLTM' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS FINAL_LIVE_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_LST','EXAM_LST_TEAM') AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'Y' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS FINAL_ALT_SCORE , MAX(CASE WHEN B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_LST','EXAM_LST_TEAM') AND NVL(D.REEXAMYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD,'X') != 'RLTM' THEN R.TOT_SCR END) AS FINAL_ETC_SCORE FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM T JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT R ON R.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND R.USER_ID = T.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ON D.EXAM_DTL_ID = T.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON B.EXAM_BSC_ID = D.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID','EXAM_LST','EXAM_LST_TEAM') AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' GROUP BY T.USER_ID )

ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , U.USER_ID AS userId , U.USERNM AS usernm , U.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , D.DEPTNM AS deptnm , NVL(QA.QA_ANS_CNT, 0) AS qaAnsCnt , NVL(QA.QA_REG_CNT, 0) AS qaRegCnt , NVL(TK.TALK_REPLY_CNT, 0) AS talkReplyCnt , NVL(ASB.ASMT_SBMSN_CNT, 0) AS asmtSbmsnCnt , NVL(AT.ASMT_TOT_CNT, 0) AS asmtTrgtCnt , NVL(QS.QUIZ_SBMSN_CNT, 0) AS quizSbmsnCnt , NVL(QT.QUIZ_TOT_CNT, 0) AS quizTrgtCnt , NVL(SS.SRVY_SBMSN_CNT, 0) AS srvySbmsnCnt , NVL(ST2.SRVY_TOT_CNT, 0) AS srvyTrgtCnt , NVL(DS.DSCC_SBMSN_CNT, 0) AS dsccSbmsnCnt , NVL(DT.DSCC_TOT_CNT, 0) AS dsccTrgtCnt , ES.MID_LIVE_SCORE AS midLiveScore , ES.MID_ALT_SCORE AS midAltScore , ES.MID_ETC_SCORE AS midEtcScore , ES.FINAL_LIVE_SCORE AS finalLiveScore , ES.FINAL_ALT_SCORE AS finalAltScore , ES.FINAL_ETC_SCORE AS finalEtcScore , COALESCE(ES.MID_LIVE_SCORE, ES.MID_ALT_SCORE, ES.MID_ETC_SCORE) AS midScore , COALESCE(ES.FINAL_LIVE_SCORE, ES.FINAL_ALT_SCORE, ES.FINAL_ETC_SCORE) AS finalScore

LEFT JOIN ASMT_TOT AT ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ASMT_SUB ASB ON ASB.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN QA_STATS QA ON QA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TALK_STATS TK ON TK.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN QUIZ_TOT QT ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN QUIZ_SUB QS ON QS.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN SRVY_TOT ST2 ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN SRVY_SUB SS ON SS.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DSCC_TOT DT ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN DSCC_SUB DS ON DS.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN EXAM_SCR ES ON ES.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.DGRS_YR AS searchYr , CASE WHEN T.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT IN ('20','21','2') THEN '2' ELSE '1' END AS searchSmstr FROM TB_LMS_ORG_SMSTR_COHORT T WHERE T.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND NVL(T.NOW_SMSTRYN,'N') = 'Y' ORDER BY T.DGRS_YR DESC, T.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS sbjctId , A.SBJCT_YR AS sbjctYr , TRIM(A.SBJCT_SMSTR) AS sbjctSmstr , A.DEPT_ID AS deptId , D.DEPTNM AS deptnm , A.CRCLMN_NO AS crclmnNo , A.SBJCTNM AS sbjctnm , A.DVCLAS_NO AS dvclasNo , A.DVCLAS_NCKNM AS dvclasNcknm , A.CRDTS AS crdts , A.WHOL_WK_CNT AS wkCnt , B.USERNM AS usernm , A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AS smstrChrtId , A.USEYN AS useyn , ( SELECT LISTAGG(U2.USERNM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SA.SBJCT_ADM_SEQNO) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SA JOIN TB_LMS_USER U2 ON U2.USER_ID = SA.USER_ID WHERE SA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND SA.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'TUT' ) AS tutor FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER B ON A.PROF_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON A.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N'

WITH , , CURRENT_WK AS ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS CURR_WKNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD IS NOT NULL AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <> '00000000' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ), STDNT_BASE AS ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , NULL AS ENTRNS_YR , E.SCYR AS GRADE , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 1 THEN END) AS WK1_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 2 THEN END) AS WK2_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 3 THEN END) AS WK3_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 4 THEN END) AS WK4_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 5 THEN END) AS WK5_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 6 THEN END) AS WK6_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 7 THEN END) AS WK7_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 8 THEN END) AS WK8_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 9 THEN END) AS WK9_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 10 THEN END) AS WK10_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 11 THEN END) AS WK11_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 12 THEN END) AS WK12_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 13 THEN END) AS WK13_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 14 THEN END) AS WK14_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 15 THEN END) AS WK15_STS , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 3 OR W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS ATND_CNT , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 2 OR ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 0 AND W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) AND W.LRN_PRGRT < NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS LATE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID CROSS JOIN CURRENT_WK CW LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL S ON S.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND NVL(S.DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND S.LCTR_WKNO < CW.CURR_WKNO LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = S.LCTR_WKNO LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , E.SCYR ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , S.USER_ID AS userId , S.USERNM AS usernm , S.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , S.DEPTNM AS deptnm , S.ENTRNS_YR AS entyR , S.GRADE AS scyr , S.ABSNCE_CNT AS absnCnt , S.ATND_CNT AS atndCnt , S.LATE_CNT AS lateCnt , S.WK1_STS AS wk1Sts , S.WK2_STS AS wk2Sts , S.WK3_STS AS wk3Sts , S.WK4_STS AS wk4Sts , S.WK5_STS AS wk5Sts , S.WK6_STS AS wk6Sts , S.WK7_STS AS wk7Sts , S.WK8_STS AS wk8Sts , S.WK9_STS AS wk9Sts , S.WK10_STS AS wk10Sts , S.WK11_STS AS wk11Sts , S.WK12_STS AS wk12Sts , S.WK13_STS AS wk13Sts , S.WK14_STS AS wk14Sts , S.WK15_STS AS wk15Sts FROM STDNT_BASE S ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC

WITH ,
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT U.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT W.USER_ID , SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT FROM WK_USER_LRN_STS W LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = W.SBJCT_ID GROUP BY W.USER_ID ) AB ON AB.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

WITH , , CURRENT_WK AS ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS CURR_WKNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD IS NOT NULL AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <> '00000000' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ), STDNT_BASE AS ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , NULL AS ENTRNS_YR , E.SCYR AS GRADE , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 1 THEN END) AS WK1_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 2 THEN END) AS WK2_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 3 THEN END) AS WK3_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 4 THEN END) AS WK4_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 5 THEN END) AS WK5_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 6 THEN END) AS WK6_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 7 THEN END) AS WK7_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 8 THEN END) AS WK8_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 9 THEN END) AS WK9_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 10 THEN END) AS WK10_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 11 THEN END) AS WK11_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 12 THEN END) AS WK12_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 13 THEN END) AS WK13_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 14 THEN END) AS WK14_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 15 THEN END) AS WK15_STS , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 3 OR W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS ATND_CNT , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 2 OR ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 0 AND W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) AND W.LRN_PRGRT < NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS LATE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID CROSS JOIN CURRENT_WK CW LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL S ON S.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND NVL(S.DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND S.LCTR_WKNO < CW.CURR_WKNO LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = S.LCTR_WKNO LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , E.SCYR ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, P.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , S.USER_ID AS userId , S.USERNM AS usernm , S.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , S.DEPTNM AS deptnm , S.ENTRNS_YR AS entyR , S.GRADE AS scyr , S.ABSNCE_CNT AS absnCnt , S.ATND_CNT AS atndCnt , S.LATE_CNT AS lateCnt , S.WK1_STS AS wk1Sts , S.WK2_STS AS wk2Sts , S.WK3_STS AS wk3Sts , S.WK4_STS AS wk4Sts , S.WK5_STS AS wk5Sts , S.WK6_STS AS wk6Sts , S.WK7_STS AS wk7Sts , S.WK8_STS AS wk8Sts , S.WK9_STS AS wk9Sts , S.WK10_STS AS wk10Sts , S.WK11_STS AS wk11Sts , S.WK12_STS AS wk12Sts , S.WK13_STS AS wk13Sts , S.WK14_STS AS wk14Sts , S.WK15_STS AS wk15Sts FROM STDNT_BASE S ORDER BY S.STDNT_NO ASC ) P WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{firstIndex} + #{listScale}) ) WHERE rnum > #{firstIndex}

WITH , , CURRENT_WK AS ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS CURR_WKNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD IS NOT NULL AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <> '00000000' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ), WK_LIST AS ( SELECT DISTINCT S.LCTR_WKNO AS WKNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL S CROSS JOIN CURRENT_WK C WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(S.DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND C.CURR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND S.LCTR_WKNO < C.CURR_WKNO ) SELECT WK.WKNO AS wkNo , COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) AS totalCnt , SUM( CASE WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS notLrnnCnt , CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) / COUNT(DISTINCT A.USER_ID) * 100 , 2) END AS notLrnnRt FROM WK_LIST WK JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC A ON A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = WK.WKNO LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID GROUP BY WK.WKNO ORDER BY WK.WKNO ASC

WITH ,
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC) AS lineNo , U.USER_ID AS userId , U.USERNM AS usernm , U.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , D.DEPTNM AS deptnm , NULL AS entyR , NVL(TO_CHAR(A.SCYR), '-') AS scyr FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID -- 학습 이력 없는 수강생(완전 미접속)도 미학습자로 포함 LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = #{wkNo} LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND CASE WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = 1
AND U.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC

WITH BASE_STDNT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ),
SELECT
FROM BASE_STDNT BS JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BS.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID

WITH BASE_STDNT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT U.USER_ID) FROM BASE_STDNT BS JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BS.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID

WITH BASE_STDNT AS ( SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ),
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, X.* FROM ( SELECT
FROM BASE_STDNT BS JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = BS.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID
ORDER BY U.STDNT_NO ASC ) X WHERE ROWNUM <= (#{firstIndex} + #{listScale}) ) WHERE rnum > #{firstIndex}

SELECT U.USER_ID AS "userId" , U.USERNM AS "usernm" , U.STDNT_NO AS "stdntNo" , ( SELECT MAX(C.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT C WHERE C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND C.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' ) AS "mobileNo" , CASE WHEN U.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'LNKG' THEN (SELECT MAX(C.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT C WHERE C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND C.CNTCT_TYCD = 'LNKG_EML') WHEN U.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'INDV' THEN (SELECT MAX(C.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT C WHERE C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND C.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') ELSE COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(C.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT C WHERE C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND C.CNTCT_TYCD = 'LNKG_EML'), (SELECT MAX(C.CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT C WHERE C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND C.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') ) END AS "email" , NVL(O.ORGNM, '-') AS "orgNm" , NULL AS "photoUrl" FROM TB_LMS_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON O.ORG_ID = U.ORG_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
AND U.ORG_ID = #{orgId}

WITH DAYS AS ( SELECT LEVEL AS DAY_NO FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 31 ), STDNT_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD')) AS DAY_NO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM LMS_ACCESS_LOGS WHERE TARGET_SUBJECT = #{sbjctId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'YYYYMM') = #{yyyymm} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD') ), ALL_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD')) AS DAY_NO , ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID),0), 1) AS AVG_CNT FROM LMS_ACCESS_LOGS WHERE TARGET_SUBJECT = #{sbjctId} AND TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'YYYYMM') = #{yyyymm} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD') ), PREV_CURR AS ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD')) AS DAY_NO , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM LMS_ACCESS_LOGS WHERE TARGET_SUBJECT = #{sbjctId} AND TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{yyyymm},'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ACCESS_DATE,'DD') ) SELECT D.DAY_NO AS "day" , NVL(P.CNT, 0) AS "prevCnt" , NVL(S.CNT, 0) AS "stdntCnt" , NVL(A.AVG_CNT,0) AS "avgCnt" FROM DAYS D LEFT JOIN STDNT_CURR S ON S.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO LEFT JOIN ALL_CURR A ON A.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO LEFT JOIN PREV_CURR P ON P.DAY_NO = D.DAY_NO ORDER BY D.DAY_NO

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(L.ACTV_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS actDttm , L.USER_REQ_CTS AS actConts , NVL(L.CNTN_BRWSR, L.REQ_TYCD) AS deviceNm , L.CNTN_IP AS ipAddr FROM TB_LMS_LOG_USER_ACTV L WHERE L.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND L.USER_ID = #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A WHERE A.USER_ID = L.USER_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} )
AND L.USER_REQ_CTS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY L.ACTV_DTTM DESC

SELECT WS.SBJCT_ID AS "sbjctId" , A.USER_ID AS "userId" , WS.LCTR_WKNO AS "wkNo" , MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID) AS "lctrWknoSchdlId" , CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.LRN_STSCD = 'ATND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'ATND' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.LRN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'LATE' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN A.LRN_STSCD = 'ABSNT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'ABSNT' WHEN MAX(NVL(A.PRGRT,0)) >= 100 THEN 'ATND' WHEN MAX(NVL(A.PRGRT,0)) > 0 THEN 'LATE' ELSE 'ABSNT' END AS "atndSts" , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_MNTS, 0)) AS "inPrdLrnMin" , 0 AS "inPrdLrnSec" , SUM(NVL(A.OTSDPRD_LRN_MNTS, 0)) AS "aftPrdLrnMin" , 0 AS "aftPrdLrnSec" , SUM(NVL(A.TOT_MNTS,0) + NVL(A.OTSDPRD_LRN_MNTS,0)) AS "totalLrnMin" , CASE WHEN MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD) IS NOT NULL AND MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD) <> '00000000' AND SUBSTR(MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD),5,4) <> '0000' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') ELSE '-' END AS "lrnStDt" , CASE WHEN MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD) IS NOT NULL AND MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD) <> '00000000' AND SUBSTR(MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD),5,4) <> '0000' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(WS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD),'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY.MM.DD') ELSE '-' END AS "lrnEndDt" , TRUNC(MAX(NVL(WS.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS,0)) / 60) AS "totDurMin" , NULL AS "lrnMthd" , CASE WHEN MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_SYMD) IS NOT NULL AND MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_SYMD) <> '00000000' AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_SYMD),'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "atndCertUseYn" , CASE WHEN WS.LCTR_WKNO = ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN,'N') = 'N' ) AND MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_EYMD) IS NOT NULL AND MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_EYMD) <> '00000000' AND SYSDATE > TO_DATE(MAX(WS.ATNDC_RCG_EYMD),'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "lastWkYn" FROM TB_LMS_BYWK_USER_LRN_STS A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WS ON WS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID WHERE WS.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WS.LCTR_WKNO = #{wkNo} AND NVL(WS.DELYN,'N') = 'N' GROUP BY WS.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID, WS.LCTR_WKNO

SELECT L.LCTR_ID AS "chsiSchdlId" , L.LCTR_SEQNO AS "chsiNo" , L.LCTRNM AS "chsiTitle" , '동영상' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , C.CONTSNM AS "cntntsTitle" , C.LCTR_CONTS_ID AS "cntntsId" , TO_CHAR(H.CONTS_LRN_SDTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(H.CONTS_LRN_EDTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , NVL(H.CONTS_LRN_TOT_MNTS, 0) AS "lrnMin" , NVL(C.ATNDC_RFLTYN,'N') AS "atndTrgtYn" , CASE WHEN NVL(H.CONTS_LRN_PRGRT,0) >= 100 THEN '학습완료' WHEN NVL(H.CONTS_LRN_PRGRT,0) > 0 THEN '학습중' ELSE '미학습' END AS "lrnSts" FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL W JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR L ON L.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = W.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND NVL(L.DELYN,'N') = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_CONTS C ON C.LCTR_ID = L.LCTR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_CONTS_LRN_HSTRY H ON H.LCTR_CONTS_ID = C.LCTR_CONTS_ID AND H.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE W.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND W.LCTR_WKNO = #{wkNo} AND NVL(W.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY L.LCTR_SEQNO ASC, C.CONTS_SEQNO ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY LOG.REG_DTTM DESC) AS "lineNo" , TO_CHAR(LOG.REG_DTTM,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "logDttm" , '[' || NVL(LOG.LRN_RND_CNT,1) || '] ' || NVL(LOG.LRN_MNTS,0) || '분' AS "playPos" , NVL(LOG.CNTN_DVC_TYCD, '-') AS "osNm" , NVL(LOG.LRN_BRWSR_INFO, '-') AS "actInfo" , NVL(LOG.RGTR_IP, '-') AS "ipAddr" FROM TB_LMS_LOG_LCTR_CONTS_LRN LOG WHERE LOG.LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{cntntsId} AND LOG.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY LOG.REG_DTTM DESC

choose.when: SELECT B.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "cntntsId" , B.EXAM_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '퀴즈' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN T.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN = 'Y' THEN '제출완료' WHEN D.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > TO_DATE(D.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , CASE WHEN NVL(B.MRK_OYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NVL(R.EVLYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND R.TOT_SCR IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(R.TOT_SCR) || '점' ELSE NULL END AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ON D.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM T ON T.EXAM_DTL_ID = D.EXAM_DTL_ID AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT R ON R.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND R.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(B.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' AND NVL(D.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(D.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY D.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM ASC

SELECT A.ATCL_ID AS "cntntsId" , A.ATCL_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , 'Q&A' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , NULL AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN A.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL THEN '질문' ELSE '답변' END AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON B.BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM ASC

SELECT S.SRVY_ID AS "cntntsId" , S.SRVY_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '설문' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SRVY_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SRVY_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN P.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > TO_DATE(S.SRVY_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_SRVY S LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP P ON P.SRVY_ID = S.SRVY_ID AND P.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(S.USEYN,'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY S.SRVY_SDTTM ASC

SELECT D.DSCS_ID AS "cntntsId" , D.DSCS_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '토론' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.DSCS_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.DSCS_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN A.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > TO_DATE(D.DSCS_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , CASE WHEN NVL(D.MRK_OYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND D.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(D.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NVL(P.EVLYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND P.SCR IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(P.SCR) || '점' ELSE NULL END AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_DSCS D LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A ON A.DSCS_ID = D.DSCS_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.ATCL_LV = 1 AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP P ON P.DSCS_ID = D.DSCS_ID AND P.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(P.DELYN,'N') = 'N' WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(D.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY D.DSCS_SDTTM ASC

SELECT A.ASMT_ID AS "cntntsId" , A.ASMT_TTL AS "cntntsTitle" , '과제' AS "cntntsTypeNm" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnStDt" , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "lrnEndDt" , CASE WHEN S.SBMSN_DTTM IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' WHEN SYSDATE > TO_DATE(A.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '학습종료' ELSE '미제출' END AS "lrnSts" , CASE WHEN NVL(A.MRK_OYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND NVL(A.MRK_INQ_SDTTM, A.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM) IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(NVL(A.MRK_INQ_SDTTM, A.SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NVL(E.EVLYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND E.SCR IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(E.SCR) || '점' ELSE NULL END AS "scoreText" FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN S ON S.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND S.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL E ON E.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = S.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY A.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT NULL AS "cntntsId" , NULL AS "cntntsTitle" , NULL AS "cntntsTypeNm" , NULL AS "lrnStDt" , NULL AS "lrnEndDt" , NULL AS "lrnSts" , NULL AS "scoreText" FROM DUAL WHERE 1 = 0

choose.when: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY T.TKEXAM_EDTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(T.TKEXAM_EDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , CASE WHEN NVL(B.MRK_OYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NVL(R.EVLYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND R.TOT_SCR IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(R.TOT_SCR) ELSE NULL END AS score , CASE WHEN NVL(B.MRK_OYN, 'N') = 'Y' AND B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE >= TO_DATE(B.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NVL(R.EVLYN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN TO_CHAR(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EP JOIN TB_LMS_QSTN Q ON Q.QSTN_ID = EP.QSTN_ID AND NVL(Q.DELYN, 'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT A ON A.EXAMPPR_ID = EP.EXAMPPR_ID AND A.USER_ID = EP.USER_ID AND A.QSTN_ID = EP.QSTN_ID WHERE EP.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND EP.USER_ID = T.USER_ID AND NVL(A.SCR, 0) = NVL(Q.QSTN_SCR, 0) )) || '/' || TO_CHAR(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EP WHERE EP.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND EP.USER_ID = T.USER_ID )) || ' 정답' ELSE NULL END AS resultText FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ON D.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM T ON T.EXAM_DTL_ID = D.EXAM_DTL_ID AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT R ON R.TKEXAM_ID = T.TKEXAM_ID AND R.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE B.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{cntntsId} AND T.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN = 'Y' ORDER BY T.TKEXAM_EDTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , A.ATCL_TTL AS title FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL A JOIN TB_LMS_BBS B ON B.BBS_ID = A.BBS_ID WHERE A.ATCL_ID = #{cntntsId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND NVL(B.DELYN,'N') = 'N' AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY P.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(P.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , '설문 참여 완료' AS contents FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP P WHERE P.SRVY_ID = #{cntntsId} AND P.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY P.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , SUBSTR(A.ATCL_CTS, 1, 100) AS contents FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{cntntsId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(A.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.SBMSN_DTTM DESC, F.ATFL_SEQNO ASC) AS lineNo , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(S.SBMSN_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sbmsnDttm , NVL(F.FILENM,'(첨부파일 없음)') AS fileNm , CASE WHEN F.FILE_SIZE >= 1048576 THEN TO_CHAR(ROUND(F.FILE_SIZE/1048576,2)) || 'MB' WHEN F.FILE_SIZE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(ROUND(F.FILE_SIZE/1024,2)) || 'KB' ELSE '-' END AS fileSzText , F.ATFL_ID AS fileId FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN S LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATFL F ON F.REF_ID = S.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND NVL(F.DELYN,'N') = 'N' WHERE S.ASMT_ID = #{cntntsId} AND S.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NVL(S.DELYN,'N') = 'N' ORDER BY S.SBMSN_DTTM DESC, F.ATFL_SEQNO ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT NULL AS lineNo , NULL AS sbmsnDttm , NULL AS title , NULL AS contents , NULL AS score , NULL AS resultText , NULL AS fileNm , NULL AS fileSzText , NULL AS fileId FROM DUAL WHERE 1 = 0

mapper.select:
WITH , , CURRENT_WK AS ( SELECT MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS CURR_WKNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND NVL(DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD IS NOT NULL AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <> '00000000' AND LCTR_WKNO_SYMD <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ), STDNT_BASE AS ( SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , NULL AS ENTRNS_YR , E.SCYR AS GRADE , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN W.WKNO IS NULL THEN 1 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) IN (2, 3) THEN 0 WHEN NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) THEN 0 WHEN W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ) AS ABSNCE_CNT , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 1 THEN END) AS WK1_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 2 THEN END) AS WK2_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 3 THEN END) AS WK3_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 4 THEN END) AS WK4_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 5 THEN END) AS WK5_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 6 THEN END) AS WK6_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 7 THEN END) AS WK7_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 8 THEN END) AS WK8_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 9 THEN END) AS WK9_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 10 THEN END) AS WK10_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 11 THEN END) AS WK11_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 12 THEN END) AS WK12_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 13 THEN END) AS WK13_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 14 THEN END) AS WK14_STS , MAX(CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO = 15 THEN END) AS WK15_STS , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 3 OR W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS ATND_CNT , SUM( CASE WHEN S.LCTR_WKNO IS NOT NULL AND ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 2 OR ( NVL(W.LRN_STS_ORD, 0) = 0 AND W.LRN_PRGRT >= NVL(C.LATE_MIN_PRGRT, 60) AND W.LRN_PRGRT < NVL(C.ATND_MIN_PRGRT, 80) ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS LATE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC E JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = E.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID CROSS JOIN CURRENT_WK CW LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL S ON S.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND NVL(S.DELYN, 'N') = 'N' AND S.LCTR_WKNO < CW.CURR_WKNO LEFT JOIN WK_USER_LRN_STS W ON W.USER_ID = U.USER_ID AND W.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID AND W.WKNO = S.LCTR_WKNO LEFT JOIN PRGRT_TO_STS C ON C.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID WHERE E.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.USERNM , U.STDNT_NO , D.DEPTNM , E.SCYR ) SELECT USER_ID AS userId , USERNM AS usernm , STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , DEPTNM AS deptnm , ENTYR AS entyR , SCYR AS scyr , ABSNCE_CNT AS absnCnt , ATND_CNT AS atndCnt , LATE_CNT AS lateCnt , WK1_STS AS wk1Sts , WK2_STS AS wk2Sts , WK3_STS AS wk3Sts , WK4_STS AS wk4Sts , WK5_STS AS wk5Sts , WK6_STS AS wk6Sts , WK7_STS AS wk7Sts , WK8_STS AS wk8Sts , WK9_STS AS wk9Sts , WK10_STS AS wk10Sts , WK11_STS AS wk11Sts , WK12_STS AS wk12Sts , WK13_STS AS wk13Sts , WK14_STS AS wk14Sts , WK15_STS AS wk15Sts FROM STDNT_BASE
